author: zgfdada
description: Upload local and remote note images to Lsky Pro with download, context-menu, and progress support - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: zgfdada
manifest.description: Upload local and remote note images to Lsky Pro with download, context-menu, and progress support.
manifest.name: Image To Lskypro Enhanced

name: Image To Lskypro Enhanced

releases.author: zgfdada
releases.description:
Obsidian community review cleanup for 1.1.3.

- Added Obsidian ESLint review rules and lint script.
- Removed inline source maps from the production bundle.
- Removed bundled image-type/runtime Node path-stream-buffer usage.
- Replaced flagged APIs with Obsidian-safe alternatives where practical.
- Keeps the 1.1.2 remote image upload fixes and cleanup behavior.

Verification:
- npm run lint
- npm test
- npm run build

releases.author: zgfdada
releases.description:
## 1.1.2

- Skip remote images that already point to the configured Lsky Pro host.
- Deduplicate repeated remote image sources before upload.
- Detect real image content type instead of trusting URL/file extensions.
- Convert unsupported formats such as WebP to PNG for legacy Lsky Pro uploads.
- Delete temporary downloaded files when remote-image upload fails.
- Add regression tests for image detection, cleanup, upload planning, and legacy conversion policy.

releases.author: zgfdada
releases.description:
## 1.1.1

- add trailing punctuation to plugin description for review compliance
- publish a clean release asset set with only main.js and manifest.json

releases.author: zgfdada
releases.description:
## Image To Lskypro Enhanced

Community-plugin release for the maintained fork with a unique plugin ID.

### Included
- remote image download before upload
- note context-menu upload action
- single floating progress notice
- old and new Lsky API compatibility
- configurable download folder
